## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website updates, and SEO improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Auto-publishing progress: New system built to automate field mapping and content publishing, saving time and improving efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Content refresh strategy: 728 URLs identified for potential refresh, with 100 selected for this week's batch.](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Website redesign: Airbyte is in the design phase of a website rebrand and restructure, focusing on main pages and product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [SEO strategy: Emphasis on creating topic pages and improving content structure to enhance topical relevance and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Auto-publishing and Workflow Improvements

  - [New system built to automate field mapping and content publishing in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Ingest API and config file created to map fields automatically](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Saves significant time and improves efficiency for both teams](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Will allow for scaling of content production and quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Testing phase beginning today, moving into beta soon](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

### Content Production and Review

  - [22 new articles ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Additional 22 pieces of content planned for this week](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Formatting issues for competitor articles resolved](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [728 URLs identified as candidates for refresh](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [100 URLs selected for this week's batch](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Process includes analyzing:](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Number of keywords](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Average keyword difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Last publication/update date](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Tracking delta between refreshed and non-refreshed pages](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Metrics to monitor: impressions, click-through rates, raw clicks, time on page, bounce rates](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Website Redesign and Structure

  - [Airbyte in design phase of website rebrand and restructure](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Focus on main pages and product pages](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Blog and articles to receive a reskin initially](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Considering implementation of topic pages and improved content structure](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Drawing inspiration from successful sites like Helpline.com and Wise.com](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### SEO Strategy and Best Practices

  - [Recommendation to create topic pages similar to blog index pages](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Emphasis on flat structure with effective use of tags and subtopics](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Goal: Create a web of topical semantics to show relevance to core business](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Avoid creating large volumes of loosely related content](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Website Migration Considerations

  - [Currently managing redirects directly in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [GrowthX offered assistance with future migration planning](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Potential for exploring new tech stack options after redesign](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue testing and implementation of auto-publishing system](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Begin content refresh process on selected 100 URLs](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Monitor and analyze performance metrics of refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Airbyte to focus on planning content strategy for new platform launch](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide async updates throughout the week on progress](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Airbyte to share website redesign plans and consider GrowthX recommendations for content structure](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Plan for future discussions on tech stack and migration strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5P1kyZZxkCtfPvwRrQ7TgyeKsxmZmm6B?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
